result.summary: Found 2 visually broken issues: a blank header CTA area that appears to be missing its label/content, and a floating scroll prompt that overlaps the fine print, making the legal text hard to read.

issues.description: The top-right gold rounded button in the header is empty with no visible label or icon, so it looks like missing content or a failed render.
issues.suggestion: Verify the CTA text/icon is loading correctly and ensure the button has a visible label and proper contrast.

issues.description: The floating "SCROLL DOWN" overlay sits on top of the small disclaimer text at the bottom, obscuring part of the legal copy and making it difficult to read.
issues.suggestion: Move the scroll prompt away from the fine print or add spacing/margins so the disclaimer remains fully visible and readable.
